ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "isin_no" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument (ISIN number) */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument held in the portfolio */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the instrument */,
  "portfolio_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the portfolio represented by the instrument */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the instrument from a credit rating agency */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* The date on which the financial instrument matures */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* The annual interest rate paid by the instrument (for bonds) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* The date when the financial instrument was issued */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* The entity that issued the financial instrument */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* The last price at which the instrument was traded */,
  "last_traded_date" TEXT /* The date of the last trade */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the ratings table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isin_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total market value of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* The investment strategy of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The overall risk level of the portfolio */,
  "investment_policy" TEXT /* A brief description of the investment policy that the portfolio follows */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio to which the instrument belongs */,
  "isin_no" TEXT /* ISIN number of the financial instrument */,
  "allocation_percentage" REAL /* Allocation percentage of the instrument within the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the allocation percentage was last updated */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* The total cost basis of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "isin_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the manager in the firm */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the manager started managing portfolios */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the manager stopped managing portfolios (if applicable) */,
  "total_experience" INTEGER /* The total years of experience the manager has in portfolio management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating agency */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Rating scale used by the agency (e.g., AAA, AA, A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating criteria */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* The date from which the rating is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* The date until which the rating is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The broader sector to which the industry belongs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total market value of the portfolio on the date */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the portfolio */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* The benchmark against which the portfolio performance is measured */,
  "alpha" REAL /* The excess return of the portfolio relative to the benchmark */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* The Sharpe ratio of the portfolio, which measures the risk-adjusted return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio involved in the transaction */,
  "isin_no" TEXT /* ISIN number of the financial instrument */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument transacted */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "broker" TEXT /* The broker through which the transaction was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* The commission paid for the transaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_isin_no FOREIGN KEY ("isin_no") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("isin_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being assessed */,
  "risk_type" TEXT /* Type of risk assessed (e.g., market risk, credit risk) */,
  "risk_value" REAL /* Value of the risk assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was made */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* The methodology used for the risk assessment */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level of the risk assessment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the risk assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
